task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into the hospital management system using the provided credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A logged-in dashboard, welcome message for 'admin', or a logout button visible in the hospital management application.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the locations or facilities management section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A menu, list, or table displaying various hospital locations, facilities, or departments.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent selected the 'Laboratory' location to edit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An edit form or details page specifically showing 'Laboratory' as the current location being viewed or modified.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the exact new description for the Laboratory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'Main clinical pathology lab. Open 24/7 for emergency samples.' typed into a description, notes, or details text field.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent saved the changes to the location details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message (e.g., 'Location updated successfully', 'Saved'), or the new description visible on the read-only details page for the Laboratory.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the graphical user interface to make the update.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is interacting with a web browser or application UI, not executing curl, API, or terminal commands.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent updated the description in the actual hospital management system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text is entered into the hospital system's form fields, not a text editor, notepad, or unrelated application.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not bypass the UI by directly editing the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: No database management tools (like DB Browser for SQLite, phpMyAdmin) or command-line SQL interfaces are used to alter the data.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target location name: 'Laboratory'. Target description: 'Main clinical pathology lab. Open 24/7 for emergency samples.'
